MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Maxine Peskens, Esq. 212-717-2900 Dontzin Nagy & Fleissig LLP for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested and he motion is unopposed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KYLE ROBERTSON'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Maxine Peskens' unopposed pro hac vice application is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT KYLE ROBERTSON'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to admit counsel pro hac vice is granted.

Court to review the proposed order submitted by the moving party.

Judge: Vedica Puri; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/VP)
